quotes.text: Scarcity creates value. If everyone can do what you do, you're competing on price. If nobody can, you're competing on nothing.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every successful business started with someone saying 'I can do this better.' Most businesses fail because 'better' isn't enough.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to stand out is to be genuinely yourself. In a world of copies, the original wins.
quotes.author: based
